title.rendered: Can Chat GPT Replace Your Marketing Department?

content.rendered: Many leaders are looking to figure out how to leverage AI tools like Chat GPT to replace their marketing staff to save money. In this podcast episode of “In The Now”, Mark Boudreau, a fractional CMO, and David Reske, CEO of Nowspeed Marketing, believe it can, but your results will be bland and ineffective. They also discuss that Chat GPT and other marketing AI tools have the potential to make us more creative, smarter and more productive, but only if we use them correctly. AI can easily turn go-getters into lazy people if we are not careful. Join me in this wide-ranging conversion about AI to help you develop a strategy for your organization. What are the most effective ways you are leveraging AI today?
